prestazioni: Engine: 7.3L AM29 V12 (engine code: AM29/73) – Full billet aluminum block reinforcement with Darton MID sleeves (0.080" overbore) and forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (23.5:1 compression ratio) for 1,200+ HP on E85 fuel. Upgraded crankshaft with Bryant Racing 4340 billet steel crank (88mm stroke) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (6.125" length).

Forced Induction: Twin Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbos (62mm compressor, 66mm turbine) with custom 3D-printed Inconel 625 exhaust manifolds (equal-length, 1.75" primary tubes) and Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates. Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović (4.5" downpipes, 3.5" center section) with dual-mode valvetronic bypass for track/road compliance.

Drivetrain & Handling: Xtrac P1227 7-speed sequential transaxle with OS Giken 3-plate carbon clutch (2,200 Nm torque capacity) and Quaife ATB differential (85% lock). Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (24-position rebound, 22-position compression, 12-click low-speed compression) and custom valving for the One-77’s aluminum/carbon monocoque. AP Racing 6-piston front (400mm discs) and 4-piston rear (380mm discs) carbon-ceramic brakes with Pagid RS29 pads.
estetica: Carbon Fiber Aero: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (pre-preg autoclave carbon) with extended front fenders (+50mm), aggressive rear overfenders (+70mm), and a custom 3D-printed front splitter (25mm adjustable dive planes). Rear diffuser by Vorsteiner (5-element design) with integrated Gurney flap for -120kg downforce at 200 km/h.

Lightweight Construction: Full carbon fiber interior by Sabelt (monocoque-compatible carbon bucket seats with 6-point harnesses, carbon door cards, and Alcantara-wrapped dashboard). Exterior carbon weave by Callaway Carbon (matte clear coat with UV-resistant top layer) and bespoke BBS FI-R wheels (20x10.5" front, 21x13" rear) with titanium lug bolts and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30 R20 front, 345/25 R21 rear).

Lighting & Details: Full LED conversion by LUX Automotive (DRLs integrated into front splitter, sequential turn signals, and OLED taillights). Custom titanium exhaust tips by Novitec (dual 120mm outlets with laser-etched Aston Martin wings). Engine bay showcasing polished titanium intake plenums (by Novitec) and carbon fiber valve covers (by Callaway Carbon) with engraved AM29/73 logos.
